message: You don't have to go through this alone. I'm here for you if you need to talk.
Thanks for the offer. I ended up making an appointment to see Dr. Kevin last week. I saw him last year when my parents were splitting up.
So like ... what did you guys talk about?

A lot about coping. He helped me figure out what actually helps me calm down when things feel out of control. We talked about breathing techniques and how to make a plan when I'm overwhelmed. He showed me some resources online too -want to see?
A couple of videos and some lists of coping strategies. I also completed an online survey that tells me how I tend to cope. It was helpful.

options.text: I'll check it out. Let me see.

actions.title: You Unlocked the Browser App!
actions.description: View the Browser app in your phone.

options.text: Nah, I think I'll be fine without them.
